content.text:
All tests pass (6 passing, 2 todo). The test "should kill the center of a filled 3x3 and produce corners-only pattern (overpopulation)" passes with no additional implementation needed.

Green Phase Complete:
**Implementation**: No new code required - the existing generalized implementation already handles overpopulation correctly via the `survives` function (cells with >3 neighbors die)
**Result**: All tests now pass (6 passing, 2 todo)
**Approach**: This is minimal because the previous Refactor phase generalized the algorithm using the standard Game of Life rules (B3/S23). The center cell of a filled 3x3 has 8 live neighbors and dies from overpopulation; the corner cells have 3 neighbors and survive; the new birth cells at edges like [-1,1] have exactly 3 neighbors and are born. No code changes needed.

Relevant files:
- /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-14_22-12-59_game-of-life-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7-no-thinking/src/game-of-life.spec.ts
